name: French's Simply Venison
recipeInstructions:
1. The secret to good venison is always to muscle the meat. Muscling means to remove each muscle individually. Once finished, you will have several cylindrical pieces resembling tenderloin.
2. Place the pieces in a Pyrex dish.
3. Sprinkle each side with meat tenderizer and coarsely ground black pepper.
4. Puncture each side liberally with a sharp fork.
5. Squeeze margarine on one side.
6. Turn the meat over and repeat the process on the other side.
7. Broil on high heat for about 4 minutes.
8. Turn the meat over and broil until brown. Remember venison is not as good when it is overcooked.
